fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally.

fields.name: Discount Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of sales discounts to post separately. No Discounts: Discounts are not posted separately but instead will subtract the discount before posting. Invoice Discounts: The invoice discount and invoice amount are posted simultaneously, based on the Sales Inv. Disc. Account field in the General Posting Setup window. Line Discounts: The line discount and the invoice amount will be posted simultaneously, based on Sales Line Disc. Account field in the General Posting Setup window. All Discounts: The invoice and line discounts and the invoice amount will be posted simultaneously, based on the Sales Inv. Disc. Account field and Sales Line. Disc. Account fields in the General Posting Setup window.

fields.name: Credit Warnings
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to warn about the customer's status when you create a sales order or invoice.

fields.name: Stockout Warning
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a warning is displayed when you enter a quantity on a sales document that brings the item's inventory level below zero.

fields.name: Shipment on Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a posted shipment and a posted invoice are automatically created when you post an invoice.

fields.name: Invoice Rounding
fields.tooltip: Specifies if amounts are rounded for sales invoices. Rounding is applied as specified in the Inv. Rounding Precision (LCY) field in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Ext. Doc. No. Mandatory
fields.tooltip: Specifies if it is mandatory to enter an external document number in the External Document No. field on a sales header or the External Document No. field on a general journal line.

fields.name: Customer Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to customers.

fields.name: Quote Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to sales quotes. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to sales orders. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Invoice Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to sales invoices. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Posted Invoice Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to posted sales invoices.

fields.name: Credit Memo Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to sales credit memos. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Posted Credit Memo Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to posted sales credit memos.

fields.name: Posted Shipment Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to posted shipments.

fields.name: Reminder Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to reminders. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Issued Reminder Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to issued reminders.

fields.name: Fin. Chrg. Memo Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to finance charge memos. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Issued Fin. Chrg. M. Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to issued finance charge memos.

fields.name: Posted Prepmt. Inv. Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to posted sales prepayment invoices.

fields.name: Posted Prepmt. Cr. Memo Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to posted sales prepayment credit memos.

fields.name: Blanket Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to blanket sales orders. To see the number series that have been set up in the No. Series table, click the field.

fields.name: Calc. Inv. Discount
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the invoice discount amount is automatically calculated with sales documents. If this check box is selected, then the invoice discount amount is calculated automatically, based on sales lines where the Allow Invoice Disc. field is selected.

fields.name: Appln. between Currencies
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether it is allowed to apply customer payments in different currencies. None: All entries involved in one application must be in the same currency. EMU: You can apply entries in euro and one of the old national currencies (for EMU countries/regions) to one another. All: You can apply entries in different currencies to one another. The entries can be in any currency.

fields.name: Copy Comments Blanket to Order
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to copy comments from blanket sales orders to sales orders.

fields.name: Copy Comments Order to Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to copy comments from sales orders to sales invoices.

fields.name: Copy Comments Order to Shpt.
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to copy comments from sales orders to shipments.

fields.name: Allow VAT Difference
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to allow the manual adjustment of VAT amounts in sales documents.

fields.name: Calc. Inv. Disc. per VAT ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the invoice discount is calculated according to the VAT identifier that is defined in the VAT posting setup. If you choose not to select this check box, the invoice discount will be calculated based on the invoice total.

fields.name: Logo Position on Documents
fields.tooltip: Specifies the position of your company logo on business letters and documents.

fields.name: Check Prepmt. when Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you cannot ship or invoice an order that has an unpaid prepayment amount.

fields.name: Prepmt. Auto Update Frequency
fields.tooltip: Specifies how often the job must run that automatically updates the status of orders that are pending prepayment.

fields.name: Default Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies which date must be used as the default posting date on sales documents. If you select Work Date, the Posting Date field will be populated with the work date at the time of creating a new sales document. If you select No Date, the Posting Date field will be empty by default and you must manually enter a posting date before posting.

fields.name: Default Quantity to Ship
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default value for the Qty. to Ship field on sales order lines and the Return Qty. to Receive field on sales return order lines. If you choose Blank, the quantity to ship is not automatically calculated.

fields.name: Post with Job Queue
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you use job queues to post sales documents in the background.

fields.name: Job Queue Category Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the category of the job queue that you want to associate with background posting.

fields.name: Job Queue Priority for Post
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the job queue when you run it in the context of background posting. In the Sales & Receivables Setup window, you can set different priorities for the post and post and print settings. The default setting is 1000.

fields.name: Post & Print with Job Queue
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you use job queues to post and print sales documents in the background.

fields.name: Job Q. Prio. for Post & Print
fields.tooltip: Specifies the priority of the job queue when you run it in the context of background posting. In the Sales & Receivables Setup window, you can set different priorities for the post and post and print settings. The default setting is 1000.

fields.name: Notify On Success
fields.tooltip: Specifies a setting that has no effect. Legacy field.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Gr. (Price)
fields.tooltip: Specifies a VAT business posting group for customers for whom you want the item price including VAT to apply.

fields.name: Direct Debit Mandate Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to direct-debit mandates.

fields.name: Allow Document Deletion Before
fields.tooltip: Specifies if and when posted sales invoices and credit memos can be deleted. If you enter a date, posted sales documents with a posting date on or after this date cannot be deleted.

fields.name: Report Output Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the output of the report that will be scheduled with a job queue entry when the Post and Print with Job Queue check box is selected.

fields.name: Document Default Line Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default value for the Type field on the first line in new sales documents. If needed, you can change the value on the line.

fields.name: Default Item Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the Quantity field is set to 1 when you fill in the Item No. field.

fields.name: Create Item from Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the system will suggest to create a new item when no item matches the description that you enter in the Description field on sales lines.

fields.name: Archive Quotes
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to automatically archive sales quotes when: deleted, processed or printed.

fields.name: Archive Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to automatically archive sales orders when: deleted, posted or printed.

fields.name: Archive Blanket Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to automatically archive sales blanket orders when: deleted, processed or printed.

fields.name: Archive Return Orders
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want to automatically archive sales return orders when deleted or posted.

fields.name: Default G/L Account Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies that Quantity is set to 1 on lines of type G/L Account.

fields.name: Create Item from Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the system will suggest to create a new item when no item matches the number that you enter in the No. Field on sales lines.

fields.name: Copy Customer Name to Entries
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the name on customer cards to be copied to customer ledger entries during posting.

fields.name: Ignore Updated Addresses
fields.tooltip: Specifies if changes to addresses made on sales documents are copied to the customer card. By default, changes are copied to the customer card.

fields.name: Skip Manual Reservation
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the reservation confirmation message is not shown on sales lines. This is useful to avoid noise when you are processing many lines.

fields.name: Disable Search by Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you can change the names of customers on open sales documents. The change applies only to the documents.

fields.name: Allow Multiple Posting Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies if multiple posting groups can be used for the same customer in sales documents.

fields.name: Check Multiple Posting Groups
fields.tooltip: Specifies implementation method of checking which posting groups can be used for the customer.

fields.name: Quote Validity Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that determines how to calculate the quote expiration date based on the document date.

fields.name: S. Invoice Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal template to use for posting sales invoices.

fields.name: S. Cr. Memo Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the journal template to use for posting sales credit memos.

fields.name: S. Prep. Inv. Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies which general journal template to use for sales invoices.

fields.name: S. Prep. Cr.Memo Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies which general journal template to use for sales credit memos.

fields.name: IC Sales Invoice Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany journal template to use for sales invoices.

fields.name: IC Sales Cr. Memo Templ. Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the intercompany journal template to use for sales credit memos.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Jnl. Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies which general journal template to use for finance charges.

fields.name: Reminder Journal Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies which general journal template to use for reminders.

fields.name: Reminder Journal Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies which general journal batch to use for reminders.

fields.name: Copy Line Descr. to G/L Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the description on document lines of type G/L Account will be carried to the resulting general ledger entries.

fields.name: Fin. Charge Jnl. Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies which general journal batch to use for finance charges.

fields.name: Canceled Issued Reminder Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to canceled issued reminders.

fields.name: Canc. Iss. Fin. Ch. Mem. Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to canceled issued finance charge memos.

fields.name: Write-in Product Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sales line type that will be used for write-in products in Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Write-in Product No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item or resource depending on the write-in product type that will be used for Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Auto Post Non-Invt. via Whse.
fields.tooltip: Specifies if non-inventory item lines in a sales document will be posted automatically when the document is posted via warehouse. None: Do not automatically post non-inventory item lines. Attached/Assigned: Post item charges and other non-inventory item lines assigned or attached to regular items. All: Post all non-inventory item lines.

fields.name: Posted Return Receipt Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to posted return receipts.

fields.name: Copy Cmts Ret.Ord. to Ret.Rcpt
fields.tooltip: Specifies that comments are copied from the sales return order to the posted return receipt.

fields.name: Copy Cmts Ret.Ord. to Cr. Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether to copy comments from sales return orders to sales credit memos.

fields.name: Return Order Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series that is used to assign numbers to new sales return orders.

fields.name: Return Receipt on Credit Memo
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a posted return receipt and a posted sales credit memo are automatically created when you post a credit memo.

fields.name: Exact Cost Reversing Mandatory
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a return transaction cannot be posted unless the Appl.-from Item Entry field on the sales order line specifies an entry.

fields.name: Price Calculation Method
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price calculation method that will be default for sales transactions.

fields.name: Price List Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the number series that will be used to assign numbers to sales price lists.

fields.name: Allow Editing Active Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies it the existing active sales price line can be modified or removed, or a new price line can be added to the active price list.

fields.name: Default Price List Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the existing sales price list that stores all new price lines created in the price worksheet page.

fields.name: Use Customized Lookup
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the Assign-to Parent No., Assign-to No., and Product No. fields on price list pages use standard lookups to find records. If you have customized these fields and prefer your implementation, turn on this toggle.

fields.name: Customer Group Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension code for customer groups in your analysis report.

fields.name: Salesperson Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension code for salespeople in your analysis report

fields.name: Freight G/L Acc. No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account that must be used to handle freight charges from Dynamics 365 Sales.

fields.name: Link Doc. Date To Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the document date changes when the posting date is modified.

fields.name: Posting Date Check on Posting
fields.tooltip: Specifies if you want the program to warn you when you post a sales document with a posting date that is different from the Work Date.
